THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VENEZIO, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAFFE, STEPHEN R. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,090.00, THE COURT FINDS THE "ANY FEE" E-MAIL LANGUAGE TELLING. WHETHER THE RETEINER WAS TO BE APPLIED TO INVESTIGATIVE WORK IS AT BEST UNCLEAR. THE COURT AGREES WITH MR. JAFFE THAT SAME INCOME FROM THE CASE IS APPROPRIATE. BUT OTHERWISE CREDITS MR. VENEZIO INTERPRETATION OF THE DOCUMENTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar May-17-2012 Discharged

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-14-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 09:10am
09:15am
Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig, clerk- Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Apellant, Stephen R. Jaffe, appears through Dustin Courley. Respondent, Robert Venezio, appears in Pro Per. Parties previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Fleisig.

Appellant requested continuance. Request is Denied and parties are requested to wait until their line is called.
EXHA(1): Declaration and Application for Continuance.

10:29am
Parties are re-called and once again the appelant requests a continuance, request is denied.
The Appellant withdraws the appeal.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-30-2011 Judgment Entered
